snvindel.gene_function_en: LRP6 is a transmembrane receptor that is a member of the LDL-related protein family (PMID: 27617575, 17143291). LRP6 interacts with the co-receptors LRP5 and Frizzled family members at the plasma membrane following WNT ligand binding, leading to initiation of WNT-mediated downstream signaling  (PMID: 24316024, 23258168). WNT signaling is a critical developmental pathway with roles in determining cell fate, tissue identity and polarity (PMID:  28218291). LRP5/6 binding by WNT ligands results in phosphorylation of CK1α and GSK3β, which recruit the signaling molecule DVL to the plasma membrane for polymerization and activation (PMID: 23258168, 19619488). DVL inactivates the β-catenin destruction complex (containing APC, GSK3β and AXIN) due to recruitment of AXIN to the co-receptor complex, allowing β-catenin to accumulate and translocate to the nucleus (PMID: 23258168). In the nucleus, β-catenin associates with the transcription factors LEF and TCF, displacing the repressive TLE proteins and forming transcription factor complexes that promote the expression of β-catenin target genes (PMID: 23258168, 19619488). LRP6 can also interact with antagonists of WNT, like the Dickkopf (DKK) proteins, to inhibit WNT activation (PMID: 21866564, 31412666, 22000856). LRP5/6 also have roles in the regulation of tissue homeostasis and intestinal epithelial development (PMID: 31412666). Germline mutations in LRP6 are associated with several malignancies including tooth agenesis, bone mass disorders, early coronary disease and neural tube defects (PMID: 26387593, 26963285, 31085352, 24203697, 17332414). LRP6 mutations have been identified in various cancer types; however, the functional role of these alterations have not yet been carefully elucidated (PMID: 25500543, 15064719). However, overexpression of LRP6 is found in a variety of cancer types, including liver, breast and colorectal cancer, suggesting that LRP6 predominantly functions as an oncogene (PMID: 31412666, 20194742).

snvindel.gene_function_en: LRP6 is a transmembrane receptor that is a member of the LDL-related protein family (PMID: 27617575, 17143291). LRP6 interacts with the co-receptors LRP5 and Frizzled family members at the plasma membrane following WNT ligand binding, leading to initiation of WNT-mediated downstream signaling  (PMID: 24316024, 23258168). WNT signaling is a critical developmental pathway with roles in determining cell fate, tissue identity and polarity (PMID:  28218291). LRP5/6 binding by WNT ligands results in phosphorylation of CK1α and GSK3β, which recruit the signaling molecule DVL to the plasma membrane for polymerization and activation (PMID: 23258168, 19619488). DVL inactivates the β-catenin destruction complex (containing APC, GSK3β and AXIN) due to recruitment of AXIN to the co-receptor complex, allowing β-catenin to accumulate and translocate to the nucleus (PMID: 23258168). In the nucleus, β-catenin associates with the transcription factors LEF and TCF, displacing the repressive TLE proteins and forming transcription factor complexes that promote the expression of β-catenin target genes (PMID: 23258168, 19619488). LRP6 can also interact with antagonists of WNT, like the Dickkopf (DKK) proteins, to inhibit WNT activation (PMID: 21866564, 31412666, 22000856). snvindel.gene_function: RECQL基因属于抑癌基因，它编码一个DNA解旋酶，该解旋酶定位于DNA损伤的位点，在该位点也招募错配修复因子并解开DNA（PMID: 15886194）。 RECQL的确切作用机制在很大程度上尚不清楚，但认为对于正确的DNA复制，DNA修复和基因组稳态是必需的（PMID: 23095637）。 RECQL的替代功能包括端粒维护（PMID: 24623817）。 RECQL已被描述为调节促进细胞迁移和侵袭并抑制细胞凋亡的基因（PMID: 25483193）。 RECQL基因在肿瘤中很少改变（cBioPortal, MSKCC, 2016年12月）。 RECQL中的胚系突变与乳腺癌易感性有关（PMID: 25945795）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为3'UTR区突变。
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3694（1850/5008）、0.428（51698/120780）、0.4314（107141/248366）、0.3729（11571/31026）、0.4446（48070/108110）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=1242890）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is located in 3'UTR of the gene.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3694（1850/5008）、0.428（51698/120780）、0.4314（107141/248366）、0.3729（11571/31026）、0.4423（34061/77016）；COSMIC数据库无记录。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function_en: The RECQL gene encodes a DNA helicase that localizes to sites of DNA damage where mismatch repair factors are also recruited and unwinds the DNA (PMID: 7961977, 8056767, 15886194). The precise mechanisms of action of RECQL are largely unknown, but it is thought to be required for proper DNA replication, DNA repair and genome homeostasis (PMID: 18074021, 20065033, 15886194, 23095637). Alternative functions for RECQL include a role in telomere maintenance (PMID: 24623817). RECQL has been described to regulate genes that promote cell migration and invasion and inhibit apoptosis (PMID: 25424877, 25483193). The RECQL gene is rarely altered in tumors (cBioPortal, MSKCC, Dec. 2016). Germline mutations in RECQL have been associated with breast cancer susceptibility (PMID: 25915596, 25945795).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.004816(523/108600) in the iJGVD database, 0.01909(51/2672) in the ASJ population of the gnomADe database, 0.01817(50/2752), 0.02711(18/664) in the EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G database; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=1207659) is Likely benign in germline classification (review status: one star). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.004816(523/108600) in the iJGVD database, 0.01909(51/2672) in ASJ population of the gnomADe database, 0.01817(50/2752), 0.02711(18/664) in EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADg database, respectively, with no record in the 1000G database; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: The RECQL gene encodes a DNA helicase that localizes to sites of DNA damage where mismatch repair factors are also recruited and unwinds the DNA (PMID: 7961977, 8056767, 15886194). The precise mechanisms of action of RECQL are largely unknown, but it is thought to be required for proper DNA replication, DNA repair and genome homeostasis (PMID: 18074021, 20065033, 15886194, 23095637). Alternative functions for RECQL include a role in telomere maintenance (PMID: 24623817). RECQL has been described to regulate genes that promote cell migration and invasion and inhibit apoptosis (PMID: 25424877, 25483193). snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.4888(8957/18326) in the EAS population of the gnomADe database; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=129229) is Benign/Likely benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.4888(8957/18326) in the EAS population of the gnomADe database; the COSMIC database records 25 times of amino acid change at the HNF1A protein position 459, of which the mutant L459= is recorded 25 times. Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.gene_function: HNF1A基因属于抑癌基因，是具有肿瘤抑制活性的转录因子，并在肝细胞分化和葡萄糖转运中发挥作用（PMID: 25233928, PMID: 26855178, PMID: 25076298）。HNF1A失活突变与3型青少年发病的成人型糖尿病（MODY3）和肝腺瘤相关（PMID: 33245425, PMID: 25076298）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为同义突变。
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe数据库EAS人群等位基因频率为0.4888（8957/18326）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=129229）的胚系突变分类为Benign/Likely benign（可靠度为两颗星）。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a synonymous mutation.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe数据库EAS人群等位基因频率为0.4888（8957/18326）；COSMIC数据库记录25次HNF1A蛋白第459位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L459=记录25次。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function_en: HNF1A, HNF1 homeobox A, is a transcription factor that demonstrates tumor suppressor activity and plays a role in hepatocyte differentiation and glucose transport (PMID: 25233928, PMID: 26855178, PMID: 25076298). HNF1A inactivating mutations are associated with maturity onset diabetes of young, type 3 (MODY3) and hepatic adenomas (PMID: 33245425, PMID: 25076298).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.4862(8812/18124) in the EAS population of the gnomADe database; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=129230) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.4862(8812/18124) in the EAS population of the gnomADe database; this variant is reported as no effect  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 47 times of amino acid change at the HNF1A protein position 487, of which the mutant S487N is recorded 46 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate.
snvindel.gene_function: HNF1A基因属于抑癌基因，是具有肿瘤抑制活性的转录因子，并在肝细胞分化和葡萄糖转运中发挥作用（PMID: 25233928, PMID: 26855178, PMID: 25076298）。HNF1A失活突变与3型青少年发病的成人型糖尿病（MODY3）和肝腺瘤相关（PMID: 33245425, PMID: 25076298）。

snvindel.gene_function_en: POLE, DNA polymerase epsilon catalytic subunit, mediates proofreading activity during DNA repair and replication (PMID: 26822575, PMID: 29604063) and plays a role in genomic stability (PMID: 31747945). Somatic mutations in POLE have been identified in colorectal cancer (PMID: 29998005, PMID: 29072370), frequently in endometrial cancer (PMID: 26822575, PMID: 28795426, PMID: 30733993), and are often associated with high tumor mutational burden (PMID: 30733993, PMID: 29880869), but are less likely to be associated with DNA mismatch repair (MMR) deficiency (PMID: 30585826).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.004681(147/31406), 0.001685(183/108604) in the gnomADg, iJGVD databases, 0.01687(17/1008) in the EAS population of the 1000G database, 0.01923(11/572) in the OTH population of the ExAC database, 0.01409(420/29812) in the SAS population of the gnomADe database, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=220837) is Benign/Likely benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.004681(147/31406), 0.001685(183/108604) in the gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively, 0.01687(17/1008) in EAS population of the 1000G database, 0.01923(11/572) in OTH population of the ExAC database, 0.01409(420/29812) in SAS population of the gnomADe database; the COSMIC database records once of amino acid change at the POLE protein position 2165, of which the mutant R2165H is recorded once. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.gene_function: POLE基因编码DNA聚合酶ε的催化亚基，具有聚合酶活性和核酸外切酶的校正活性。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第2165位氨基酸由精氨酸突变为组氨酸。
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.004681（147/31406）、0.001685（183/108604），1000G数据库EAS人群等位基因频率为0.01687（17/1008），ExAC数据库OTH人群等位基因频率为0.01923（11/572），gnomADe数据库SAS人群等位基因频率为0.01409（420/29812）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=220837）的胚系突变分类为Benign/Likely benign（可靠度为两颗星）。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 2165th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Histidine.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.009784（49/5008）、0.004681（147/31406）、0.001717（133/77444），ExAC数据库OTH人群等位基因频率为0.01923（11/572），gnomADe数据库SAS人群等位基因频率为0.01409（420/29812）；COSMIC数据库记录1次POLE蛋白第2165位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型H记录1次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function_en: POLE, DNA polymerase epsilon catalytic subunit, mediates proofreading activity during DNA repair and replication (PMID: 26822575, PMID: 29604063) and plays a role in genomic stability (PMID: 31747945). Somatic mutations in POLE have been identified in colorectal cancer (PMID: 29998005, PMID: 29072370), frequently in endometrial cancer (PMID: 26822575, PMID: 28795426, PMID: 30733993), and are often associated with high tumor mutational burden (PMID: 30733993, PMID: 29880869), but are less likely to be associated with DNA mismatch repair (MMR) deficiency (PMID: 30585826).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.5651(2830/5008), 0.4941(58808/119032), 0.4936(122871/248930), 0.4925(15426/31322), 0.6997(75987/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as Benign in the ClinVar database(ID=380218, review status: two stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.5651(2830/5008), 0.4941(58808/119032), 0.4936(122871/248930), 0.4925(15426/31322), 0.6997(75987/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Somatic mutations in POLE have been identified in colorectal cancer (PMID: 29998005, PMID: 29072370), frequently in endometrial cancer (PMID: 26822575, PMID: 28795426, PMID: 30733993), and are often associated with high tumor mutational burden (PMID: 30733993, PMID: 29880869), but are less likely to be associated with DNA mismatch repair (MMR) deficiency (PMID: 30585826).

Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function: ERCC5基因编码一个单链特异性DNA内切酶，使紫外线损伤后DNA切除修复中的3'切口。该蛋白也可在其他细胞过程中发挥作用，包括RNA聚合酶Ⅱ转录和转录偶联DNA修复。该基因的突变导致着色性干皮病互补组G（xp-g），也被称为着色性干皮病VII（xp7），这是一种皮肤疾病，其特征是对紫外线过敏，并且在紫外线照射后对皮肤癌发展的敏感性增加。一些患者也会出现Cockayne综合征，其特征是严重的生长缺陷、智力迟钝和恶病质。该基因与相邻的上游bivm（碱性，免疫球蛋白样可变基序）基因之间存在直接转录。

snvindel.gene_function_en: ERCC5 (also known as XPG) is a DNA endonuclease that is involved in the nucleotide-excision repair (NER) pathway (PMID: 8652557, 8206890, 8090225, 17466625). Hereditary variants in ERCC5 have been implicated in several disorders with defective DNA repair including xeroderma pigmentosum, Cocayne's syndrome, cerebrooculofacioskeletal syndrome, and arthrogryposis (PMID: 24700531, 8317483, 2478446). Somatic ERCC5 mutations have not yet been determined to be driver mutations in cancer although aberrant expression has been detected in breast and ovarian cancer (PMID: 18565881, 19289372). ERCC5-mutant cells may be increasingly sensitive to DNA damaging agents due to defects in DNA repair pathways (PMID: 7799936).

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.04233(212/5008), 0.04414(5354/121294), 0.0426(10707/251362), 0.04944(1552/31392), 0.0617(6701/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function: ERCC5基因编码一个单链特异性DNA内切酶，使紫外线损伤后DNA切除修复中的3'切口。该蛋白也可在其他细胞过程中发挥作用，包括RNA聚合酶Ⅱ转录和转录偶联DNA修复。该基因的突变导致着色性干皮病互补组G（xp-g），也被称为着色性干皮病VII（xp7），这是一种皮肤疾病，其特征是对紫外线过敏，并且在紫外线照射后对皮肤癌发展的敏感性增加。一些患者也会出现Cockayne综合征，其特征是严重的生长缺陷、智力迟钝和恶病质。该基因与相邻的上游bivm（碱性，免疫球蛋白样可变基序）基因之间存在直接转录。

snvindel.gene_function_en: ERCC5 (also known as XPG) is a DNA endonuclease that is involved in the nucleotide-excision repair (NER) pathway (PMID: 8652557, 8206890, 8090225, 17466625). Hereditary variants in ERCC5 have been implicated in several disorders with defective DNA repair including xeroderma pigmentosum, Cocayne's syndrome, cerebrooculofacioskeletal syndrome, and arthrogryposis (PMID: 24700531, 8317483, 2478446). Somatic ERCC5 mutations have not yet been determined to be driver mutations in cancer although aberrant expression has been detected in breast and ovarian cancer (PMID: 18565881, 19289372). ERCC5-mutant cells may be increasingly sensitive to DNA damaging agents due to defects in DNA repair pathways (PMID: 7799936).

snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.6665（3338/5008）、0.5886（71261/121070）、0.5747（142783/248466）、0.6478（20307/31350）、0.5029（54617/108604）；ClinVar数据库报道为Benign（ID=2788064，可靠度为一颗星）。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is located in the intron of the gene.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.6665（3338/5008）、0.5886（71261/121070）、0.5747（142783/248466）、0.6478（20307/31350）、0.5029（54617/108604）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function_en: The DLST gene encodes a mitochondrial protein that belongs to the 2-oxoacid dehydrogenase family. This protein is one of the three components (the E2 component) of the 2-oxoglutarate dehydrogenase complex that catalyzes the overall conversion of 2-oxoglutarate to succinyl-CoA and CO.

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.5801(2905/5008), 0.5634(68392/121384), 0.575(144593/251482), 0.5275(16532/31338), 0.8228(89363/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=257253) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing, according to the sequence conservation prediction software phastCons46 and phyloP46, the sequence at this position is not highly conserved.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.5801(2905/5008), 0.5634(68392/121384), 0.575(144593/251482), 0.5275(16532/31338), 0.8228(89363/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 7 times of amino acid change at the MLH3 protein position 1445, of which the mutant Q1445= is recorded 7 times. Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing, according to the sequence conservation prediction software phastCons46 and phyloP46, the sequence at this position is not highly conserved.
snvindel.gene_function: MLH3基因是DNA错配修复（MMR）基因的MutL同源（MLH）家族的成员，MLH参与DNA复制与减数分裂重组后基因组完整性的维持。MLH3基因的体细胞突变经常发生在表现出微卫星不稳定性的肿瘤中，胚系突变与遗传性非息肉性结直肠癌7型（HNPCC7）相关。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为同义突变。
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.5801（2905/5008）、0.5634（68392/121384）、0.575（144593/251482）、0.5275（16532/31338）、0.8228（89363/108604）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=257253）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接，根据序列保守性预测软件phastCons46、phyloP46判断该位置序列不保守。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a synonymous mutation.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.5801（2905/5008）、0.5634（68392/121384）、0.575（144593/251482）、0.5275（16532/31338）、0.822（63659/77444）；COSMIC数据库记录4次MLH3蛋白第1421位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型Q记录4次。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接，根据序列保守性预测软件phastCons46、phyloP46判断该位置序列不保守。
snvindel.gene_function_en: MLH3, DNA mismatch repair protein Mlh3, is a DNA mismatch repair gene that dimerizes with MLH1 and localizes to centrosomes (PMID: 24333356, PMID: 25116689). MLH3 mutations have been associated with cervical squamous cell carcinoma (PMID: 24759751).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.01418(71/5008), 0.06157(6687/108604) in the 1000G, iJGVD database, respectively, 0.05755(498/8654), 0.05545(1020/18394), 0.04872(76/1560) in EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg database, respectively; this variant is reported as Benign/Likely benign in the ClinVar database(ID=314372, review status: two stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.01418(71/5008), 0.06157(6687/108604) in the 1000G, iJGVD database, respectively, 0.05755(498/8654), 0.05545(1020/18394), 0.04872(76/1560) in EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg database, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 826th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Asparagine to Aspartic acid.
snvindel.gene_function_en: MLH3, DNA mismatch repair protein Mlh3, is a DNA mismatch repair gene that dimerizes with MLH1 and localizes to centrosomes (PMID: 24333356, PMID: 25116689). MLH3 mutations have been associated with cervical squamous cell carcinoma (PMID: 24759751).

snvindel.gene_function: DICER1基因是核糖核酸酶III（RNaseIII）家族的成员，参与microRNA（miRNA）的产生，microRNA（miRNA）在转录后水平调节基因表达，在micro-RNA的合成和细胞增殖中起作用（PMID: 26033159）。Dicer1的体细胞功能丧失突变与多种癌症（PMID: 25176334）有关，包括子宫内膜癌（PMID: 26033159）、胸膜肺母细胞瘤（PPB）、囊性肾瘤（CN）和支持性间质细胞瘤（SLCT）（PMID: 27906793）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为内含子区突变。

snvindel.gene_function_en: DICER1, endoribonuclease Dicer, plays a role in synthesis of micro-RNA's and in cell proliferation (PMID: 26033159). Somatic loss of function mutations in Dicer1 have been linked to a variety of cancers (PMID: 25176334) including, endometrial (PMID: 26033159), pleuropulmonary blastoma (PPB), cystic nephroma (CN), and Sertoli-Leydig cell tumor (SLCT) (PMID: 27906793).

snvindel.gene_function_en: XRCC3, X-ray repair cross complementing 3, is a family member of the XRCC genes that is involved in homologous recombination repair (PMID: 15279796). XRCC3 mutations have been identified in breast, skin, lung, and bladder cancers (PMID: 15723711).

The COSMIC database records 14 times of amino acid change at the FAN1 protein position 233, of which the mutant G233E is recorded 12 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function: FAN1基因在DNA的跨链修复中起作用，编码一个具有5'皮瓣核酸内切酶和5'-3'外切酶活性的蛋白质。FAN1基因突变可引起核型巨核间质性肾炎。另外，还描述了编码不同亚型的剪接转录变体。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第233位氨基酸由甘氨酸突变为谷氨酸。

snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene plays a role in DNA interstrand cross-link repair and encodes a protein with 5' flap endonuclease and 5'-3' exonuclease activity. Mutations in this gene cause karyomegalic interstitial nephritis. Alternatively spliced transcript variants encoding distinct isoforms have been described.

snvindel.gene_function: FAN1基因在DNA的跨链修复中起作用，编码一个具有5'皮瓣核酸内切酶和5'-3'外切酶活性的蛋白质。FAN1基因突变可引起核型巨核间质性肾炎。另外，还描述了编码不同亚型的剪接转录变体。

snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene plays a role in DNA interstrand cross-link repair and encodes a protein with 5' flap endonuclease and 5'-3' exonuclease activity. Mutations in this gene cause karyomegalic interstitial nephritis. Alternatively spliced transcript variants encoding distinct isoforms have been described.

snvindel.gene_function: GREM1基因属于原癌基因，编码蛋白是一种神经母细胞瘤的鉴别筛选基因（DAN）家族骨形态发生蛋白（BMP）的拮抗剂，编码蛋白通过拮抗BMP信号传导来调节肢体和肾脏发育 （PMID: 25592806），并参与细胞增殖 （PMID: 23394397） 和上皮间质转化 （PMID: 23548835）。

snvindel.gene_function_en: GREM1, gremlin 1, DAN family BMP antagonist, regulates limb and kidney development through antagonizing BMP signaling (PMID: 25592806), and is involved in cell proliferation (PMID: 23394397) and epithelial-mesenchymal transition (PMID: 23548835).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.04533(227/5008), 0.01494(1800/120520), 0.01379(3463/251180), 0.02463(771/31302), 0.08724(9475/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=317299) is Benign/Likely benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function: SLX4基因编码SLX4蛋白，SLX4蛋白参与与DNA损伤修复相关的各种过程。SLX4蛋白定位于DNA上的双链断裂（DSB），通过招募参与DNA修复和基因组稳定性的蛋白质形成多蛋白复合物，如ERCC1/ERCC4和SLX1核酸内切酶、MSH2/MSH3错配修复复合物和端粒TRF2等（PMID: 19596235, PMID: 19596236, PMID: 19595721, PMID: 19595722）。SLX4对部分类型的DNA修复至关重要，包括DNA链间交联（ICLs）、霍利迪连接（HJ）解析和端粒稳态（PMID: 24938228）。SLX4蛋白在各种肿瘤中突变频率较低，该基因的胚系突变是范可尼贫血互补组P（FANCP）的原因（PMID: 21240275, PMID: 21240277）。SLX4被认为是家族性非BRCA1/2突变型乳腺癌患者的一种假定遗传因素，但尚未被研究证实（PMID: 22911665, PMID: 22401137, PMID: 21805310, PMID: 23211700）。

snvindel.gene_function: ERCC4基因编码的蛋白质与ERCC1形成复合物，参与核苷酸切除修复过程中的5'切口。该复合物是一种与EME1相互作用的结构特异性DNA修复内切酶。该基因缺陷是着色性干皮病互补组F（xp-f）或着色性干皮病VI（xp6）的原因。

snvindel.gene_function_en: ERCC4 (also known as XPF) is a DNA endonuclease protein that is active when in a complex in ERCC1 (PMID: 22101340, 9525876). The ERCC4-ERCC1 complex is required to cut at the junction between double stranded and single stranded DNA and has important functions in nucleotide excision repair, DNA double-strand break repair, and DNA interstrand crosslinks repair (PMID: 22101340, 9525876). Hereditary mutations in ERCC4 have been identified in skin-photosensitive and DNA repair deficient disorders including xeroderma pigmentosum, Cocakyane synrome, XFE progeroid syndrome and Fanconi Anemia (PMID: 23623386, 23623389). Somatic ERCC4 mutations are rare in cancer, however, loss-of-function germline ERCC4 mutations can cause a predisposition for cancer (PMID: 22941649, 24465539). ERCC4-mutant cell are sensitive to DNA damaging reagents due to deficiencies in DNA repair pathways (PMID: 26074087).

snvindel.gene_function_en: ERCC4 (also known as XPF) is a DNA endonuclease protein that is active when in a complex in ERCC1 (PMID: 22101340, 9525876). The ERCC4-ERCC1 complex is required to cut at the junction between double stranded and single stranded DNA and has important functions in nucleotide excision repair, DNA double-strand break repair, and DNA interstrand crosslinks repair (PMID: 22101340, 9525876). Hereditary mutations in ERCC4 have been identified in skin-photosensitive and DNA repair deficient disorders including xeroderma pigmentosum, Cocakyane synrome, XFE progeroid syndrome and Fanconi Anemia (PMID: 23623386, 23623389). Somatic ERCC4 mutations are rare in cancer, however, loss-of-function germline ERCC4 mutations can cause a predisposition for cancer (PMID: 22941649, 24465539). ERCC4-mutant cell are sensitive to DNA damaging reagents due to deficiencies in DNA repair pathways (PMID: 26074087).

snvindel.gene_function_en: CDH1, cadherin 1, type 1, encodes E-Cadherin and is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) involved in epithelial cell-cell adhesion, cell signaling, differentiation, and polarity (PMID: 18726070, PMID: 26674224). snvindel.gene_function_en: This intronless gene encodes the receptor protein for melanocyte-stimulating hormone (MSH). The encoded protein, a seven pass transmembrane G protein coupled receptor, controls melanogenesis. Two types of melanin exist: red pheomelanin and black eumelanin. Gene mutations that lead to a loss in function are associated with increased pheomelanin production, which leads to lighter skin and hair color. Eumelanin is photoprotective but pheomelanin may contribute to UV-induced skin damage by generating free radicals upon UV radiation. Binding of MSH to its receptor activates the receptor and stimulates eumelanin synthesis. This receptor is a major determining factor in sun sensitivity and is a genetic risk factor for melanoma and non-melanoma skin cancer. Over 30 variant alleles have been identified which correlate with skin and hair color, providing evidence that this gene is an important component in determining normal human pigment variation.

snvindel.gene_function_en: TP53, cellular tumor antigen p53, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) involved in cell cycle arrest and apoptosis, and is the most frequently mutated gene in cancer (PMID: 10065147, PMID: 22713868). TP53 germline mutations are common in Li-Fraumeni syndrome (PMID: 30239254) and somatic missense mutations are frequent in almost all cancer types cancers (PMID: 30224644) and are also implicated in chemoresistance (PMID: 9927204, PMID: 24065105, PMID: 27066457).

snvindel.gene_function: RNF43，无名指蛋白43，是一种E3泛素连接酶，靶向Frizzled受体，导致Frizzled的溶酶体降解和Wnt信号的负调控（PMID: 25460271）。RNF43突变与多种肿瘤类型有关，在结直肠癌和子宫内膜癌中很常见（PMID: 25460271, PMID: 25344691）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第117位氨基酸由精氨酸突变为组氨酸。
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2262（1133/5008）、0.1641（19089/116342）、0.1578（38482/243942）、0.1515（4739/31272）、0.3276（35581/108604）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=1165517）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录104次RNF43蛋白第117位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R117H记录12次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 117th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Histidine.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2262（1133/5008）、0.1641（19089/116342）、0.1578（38482/243942）、0.1515（4739/31272）、0.3283（25426/77444）；COSMIC数据库记录82次RNF43蛋白第117位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型H记录10次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function_en: RNF43, ring finger protein 43, is an E3 ubiquitin ligase that targets Frizzled receptors, resulting in lysosomal degradation of Frizzleds and negative regulation of Wnt signaling (PMID: 25460271). RNF43 mutations are associated with several tumor types, and are frequent in colorectal and endometrial cancer (PMID: 25460271, PMID: 25344691).

Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing, according to the sequence conservation prediction software phastCons46 and phyloP46, the sequence at this position is not highly conserved.

snvindel.gene_function: BRIP1基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白是RecQ DEAH解旋酶家族的成员，参与DNA受损修复过程。BRIP1蛋白与BRCA1蛋白相互作用，共同修补受损的DNA链，从而阻止细胞内积累过多可能触发其分裂失控的基因损伤。

Inactivation of PRKAR1A is associated with Carney complex (PMID: 20301463) and adrenocortical tumors (PMID: 26042218).

snvindel.gene_function: RHBDF2属于一个保守的抑制性菱形样假蛋白酶家族，其缺乏必需的催化残基并抑制菱形依赖性EGF信号传导（PMID: 21439629），其相关病症为酪氨酸伴食管癌（OMIM）。分子机制研究表明，RHBDF2激活丝裂原活化蛋白激酶7（mitogen-activated protein kinase 3， MAP7K21）依赖性通路，促进肝脂肪变性。此外，RHBDF2激活肿瘤坏死因子（TNF）-α和表皮生长因子受体（EGFR）信号传导，增强狼疮性肾炎。RHBDF2高表达可诱导EGFR、WNT和转化生长因子（TGF）-β信号传导增强，与宫颈癌预后不良显著相关。此外，RHBDF2过表达激活TGF-β信号传导，增强胃癌癌细胞的侵袭性（PMID: 36943228）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第179位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为亮氨酸。

snvindel.gene_function_en: RHBDF2 belongs to a conserved family of inhibitory rhomboid-like pseudoproteases that lack essential catalytic residues and inhibit rhomboid-dependent EGF signaling （PMID: 21439629）.Several recent studies have suggested that RHBDF2 is significantly upregulated in tumors and has pro‐tumor effects. Molecular mechanism studies have shown that RHBDF2 activates the mitogen‐activated protein kinase 7 (MAP3K7)‐dependent pathway and promotes hepatic steatosis. Furthermore, RHBDF2 activates tumor necrosis factor (TNF)‐α, and epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) signaling and enhances lupus nephritis. High RHBDF2 expression can induce enhanced EGFR, WNT and transforming growth factor (TGF)‐β signaling, and was dramatically linked to poor prognosis of cervical cancer. Additionally, RHBDF2 overexpression activated TGF‐β signaling and enhanced the aggressiveness of cancer cells in gastric cancer. Recent studies have shown that RHBDF2 has a critical impact on the immune regulation of disease. Therefore, RHBDF2 has a multifaceted influence on the tumor immune microenvironment, which has a pro‐tumor effect（PMID：36943228）.

snvindel.gene_function: ERCC2是ERCC切除修复2TFIIH核心复合解旋酶亚基，是一种依赖于ATP的5’-3’DNA解旋酶，在核苷酸切除修复，RNA转录和染色体分离中起作用（PMID: 20797633）。 ERCC2变异与胃癌（PMID: 24338713）和肺癌（PMID: 20627704）的易感性有关，ERCC2体细胞突变导致的功能丧失可能赋予对顺铂（PMID: 29980530）的敏感性。

snvindel.gene_function_en: ERCC2, ERCC excision repair 2 TFIIH core complex helicase subunit, is an ATP-dependent 5’-3’ DNA helicase that plays a role in nucleotide excision repair, RNA transcription, and chromosome segregation (PMID: 20797633). ERCC2 variants have been associated with susceptibility to gastric cancer (PMID: 24338713) and lung cancer (PMID: 20627704) and somatic Ercc2 loss of function mutations may confer sensitivity to cisplatin (PMID: 29980530).

snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1883（943/5008）、0.1154（13802/119582）、0.1106（27583/249360）、0.1263（3948/31262）、0.1956（21242/108604）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=380220）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录18次POLD1蛋白第119位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R119H记录16次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 119th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Histidine.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1883（943/5008）、0.1154（13802/119582）、0.1106（27583/249360）、0.1263（3948/31262）、0.196（15179/77444）；COSMIC数据库记录14次POLD1蛋白第119位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型H记录12次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function_en: POLD1, polymerase (DNA directed), delta 1, catalytic subunit, is the catalytic subunit of DNA polymerase delta, which mediates DNA replication (PMID: 27320729). POLD1 mutations have been identified in a variety of human cancers (PMID: 27320729).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1869(936/5008), 0.1145(13864/121128), 0.1105(27712/250892), 0.127(3976/31300), 0.1946(21134/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=371890) is Benign/Likely benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: POLD1, polymerase (DNA directed), delta 1, catalytic subunit, is the catalytic subunit of DNA polymerase delta, which mediates DNA replication (PMID: 27320729). POLD1 mutations have been identified in a variety of human cancers (PMID: 27320729).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 1.0(5008/5008), 1.0(120931/120934), 1.0(249433/249436), 1.0(31400/31400) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the iJGVD database; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=133599) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 19 times of amino acid change at the ASXL1 protein position 815, of which the mutant L815P is recorded 15 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function: ASXL1是转录调节因子，参与基因表达的表观遗传调控，并与几种蛋白质形成复合物以调控转录（PMID: 23736028）。ASXL1突变在慢性粒细胞单核细胞白血病中很常见（PMID: 26771811, PMID: 23736028），并且已在许多不同的肿瘤类型包括急性髓细胞性白血病和肝癌（PMID: 23736028）中被报道。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第815位氨基酸由亮氨酸突变为脯氨酸。
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为1.0（5008/5008）、1.0（120931/120934）、1.0（249433/249436）、1.0（31400/31400），iJGVD数据库无记录；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=133599）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录19次ASXL1蛋白第815位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L815P记录15次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 815th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Leucine to Proline.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为1.0（5008/5008）、1.0（120931/120934）、1.0（249433/249436）、1.0（31400/31400），iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录19次ASXL1蛋白第815位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L815P记录15次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ASXL1, additional sex combs like 1, transcriptional regulator, is involved in epigenetic regulation of gene expression and forms complexes with several proteins to regulate transcription (PMID: 23736028). Mutations in ASXL1 are frequent in chronic myelomonocytic leukemia (PMID: 26771811, PMID: 23736028), and have been identified in a number of different tumor types including acute myeloid leukemia and liver cancer (PMID: 23736028).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.04014(201/5008), 0.02317(2812/121340), 0.02777(6982/251428), 0.01879(590/31394), 0.04635(5034/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as Benign in the ClinVar database(ID=338104, review status: two stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing, according to the sequence conservation prediction software phastCons46 and phyloP46, the sequence at this position is not highly conserved.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.04014(201/5008), 0.02317(2812/121340), 0.02777(6982/251428), 0.01879(590/31394), 0.04635(5034/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 6 times of amino acid change at the ASXL1 protein position 995, of which the mutant H995= is recorded 4 times. Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing, according to the sequence conservation prediction software phastCons46 and phyloP46, the sequence at this position is not highly conserved.

snvindel.gene_function_en: ASXL1, additional sex combs like 1, transcriptional regulator, is involved in epigenetic regulation of gene expression and forms complexes with several proteins to regulate transcription (PMID: 23736028). Mutations in ASXL1 are frequent in chronic myelomonocytic leukemia (PMID: 26771811, PMID: 23736028), and have been identified in a number of different tumor types including acute myeloid leukemia and liver cancer (PMID: 23736028).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.4058(2032/5008), 0.4183(50724/121254), 0.4242(106546/251140), 0.3686(11551/31336), 0.6648(72196/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=338113) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.gene_function: ASXL1是转录调节因子，参与基因表达的表观遗传调控，并与几种蛋白质形成复合物以调控转录（PMID: 23736028）。ASXL1突变在慢性粒细胞单核细胞白血病中很常见（PMID: 26771811, PMID: 23736028），并且已在许多不同的肿瘤类型包括急性髓细胞性白血病和肝癌（PMID: 23736028）中被报道。

Mutations in ASXL1 are frequent in chronic myelomonocytic leukemia (PMID: 26771811, PMID: 23736028), and have been identified in a number of different tumor types including acute myeloid leukemia and liver cancer (PMID: 23736028).

snvindel.gene_function: GNAS基因属于原癌基因。编码蛋白作为一个重要的信号转导蛋白，主要功能是在G蛋白偶联受体信号转导途径中，激活腺苷酸环化酶，导致cAMP水平的升高，参与调控细胞生长和细胞分裂。

snvindel.gene_function_en: GNAS, GNAS complex locus, is a GTPase that is activated upon ligand binding of a G-protein coupled receptor, and is involved in mediating hormone response (PMID: 23640210, PMID: 25851935). Hotspot mutations impair Gnas GTPase activity, resulting in constitutive pathway activation and are common in a variety of tumor types (PMID: 23640210).

snvindel.gene_function_en: The protein encoded by this gene is an orphan G protein-coupled receptor of unknown function. The encoded protein is a member of a family of proteins that contain seven transmembrane domains and transduce extracellular signals through heterotrimeric G proteins.

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异可以拆成2个位点，分别为位点1（2-215632255-C-T，c.1519G>A(p.Val507Met)）、位点2（2-215632256-A-G，c.1518T>C (p.His506=)）。位点1在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3662（1834/5008）、0.3783（45875/121256）、0.3739（93956/251276）、0.384（12025/31318）、0.3597（39061/108582）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=140757）的胚系突变分类为Benign/Likely benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录20次BARD1蛋白第507位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V507M记录20次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。位点2在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.7706（3859/5008）、0.8134（98671/121304）、0.8169（205304/251312）、0.7661（23998/31326）、0.9258（100513/108568）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=183704）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接，根据序列保守性预测软件phastCons46、phyloP46判断该位置序列不保守。合并位点在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=215471）的胚系突变分类为Benign/Likely benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录20次BARD1蛋白第507位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V507M记录20次。基于整合预测工具BayesDel认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: The variant can be split into 2 loci, locus 1 (2-215632255-C-T, c.1519G>A (p.Val507Met)), and locus 2 (2-215632256-A-G, c.1518T>C (p.His506=)). The allele frequencies of locus 1 in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, and iJGVD database populations were 0.3662 (1834/5008), 0.3783 (45875/121256), 0.3739 (93956/251276), and 0.384 (12025/31318), respectively, 0.3597 (39061/108582); the ClinVar database reported the germline mutation classification of this variant (ID=140757) as Benign/Likely benign (with a reliability of two stars).The COSMIC database recorded 20 variants on amino acid position 507 of the BARD1 protein, with mutant type V507M recorded 20 times. Based on the integration prediction tool REVEL considered the variant as NEUTRAL and the splicing prediction software SpliceAI considered the variant as not affecting splicing. The allele frequencies of locus 2 in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database populations were 0.7706 (3859/5008), 0.8134 (98671/121304), 0.8169 (205304/251312), 0.7661 (23998/31326) , 0.9258 (100513/108568); the ClinVar database reported the germline mutation classification of this variant (ID=183704) as Benign (two stars for reliability). Based on the splicing prediction software SpliceAI, the variant was considered not to affect splicing, and the positional sequence was judged not to be conserved based on the sequence conservation prediction software phastCons46, phyloP46.This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=215471) is Benign/Likely benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 20 times of amino acid change at the BARD1 protein position 507, of which the mutant V507M is recorded 20 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
p_var.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第507位氨基酸由缬氨酸突变为蛋氨酸。
p_var.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 507th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Methionine.

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.7706（3859/5008）、0.8134（98671/121304）、0.8169（205304/251312）、0.7661（23998/31326）、0.9258（100513/108568）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=183704）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接，根据序列保守性预测软件phastCons46、phyloP46判断该位置序列不保守。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.7706(3859/5008), 0.8134(98671/121304), 0.8169(205304/251312), 0.7661(23998/31326), 0.9258(100513/108568) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=183704) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing, according to the sequence conservation prediction software phastCons46 and phyloP46, the sequence at this position is not highly conserved.

Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing; the loss-of-function mechanism is the main pathogenic mechanism of the APC gene, and this variant is located outside the first 15-amino acids of the β-catenin binding domain(p.1021-p.1035).

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1883（943/5008）、0.1154（13802/119582）、0.1106（27583/249360）、0.1263（3948/31262）、0.1956（21242/108604）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=380220）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录18次POLD1蛋白第119位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R119H记录16次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。

The COSMIC database records 18 times of amino acid change at the POLD1 protein position 119, of which the mutant R119H is recorded 16 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
